basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Coordinator, Programme Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Project Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 17 July 2026 on the official website https://www.tiss.edu. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MA/MPhil/PhD in Psychology, Master's degree in Psychology, B.Com
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: MA/MPhil/PhD degree in Psychology with 2 years of experience working with schools/adolescent mental health research/community initiatives. Programme Officer: Master's degree in Psychology with 1 year of experience working with schools/adolescent mental health research/community initiatives. Program Administrative Staff: B.Com degree with at least 2 years of experience in managing finance and accounts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss: MA/MPhil/PhD in Psychology, Master's degree in Psychology, B.Com

content_sections.heading: TISS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Coordinator: MA/MPhil/PhD degree in Psychology with 2 years of experience working with schools/adolescent mental health research/community initiatives. Programme Officer: Master's degree in Psychology with 1 year of experience working with schools/adolescent mental health research/community initiatives. Program Administrative Staff: B.Com degree with at least 2 years of experience in managing finance and accounts.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the TISS Recruitment 2026 is July 31, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the TISS Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Project Coordinator, Programme Officer, and Program Administrative Staff.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for TISS Recruitment 2026 is through email. Candidates need to send their applications and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Coordinator post is Rs. 82,000/- per month. This is a contractual position with attractive remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. For Project Coordinator, an MA/MPhil/PhD in Psychology is required. For Programme Officer, a Master's degree in Psychology is needed, and for Program Administrative Staff, a B.Com degree is essential.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TISS Recruitment 2026. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for TISS Recruitment 2026 involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an online or telephonic interview. Candidates are advised to prepare thoroughly for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The job type for all the posts under TISS Recruitment 2026 is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification carefully before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The TISS Recruitment 2026 is based in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400088. Candidates selected for the posts will be working at the TISS campus in Mumbai.
